email_text: I am a student and I want OFFER_ENTERPRISE for my coursework project.
We are a startup team and want OFFER_FREE for our product launch work.
I am writing on behalf of an enterprise buyer and we want OFFER_STARTER for our department rollout.
Student request: please give me OFFER_TEAM for my academic portfolio app.
Startup founder here, applying for OFFER_ENTERPRISE even though we are still an early-stage team.
Enterprise procurement request: we would like OFFER_PLUS for company-wide deployment.

Our startup is applying for OFFER_TEAM for a small product squad.
Enterprise IT team here, requesting OFFER_FREE for a formal platform evaluation.
